decisions.summary: Scope reviewability accepted for a single PR: the story/spec/architecture docs, responsibility/contract metadata, runtime implementation, and regression tests all support one behavior change: scoped invalidation of stale verification evidence by changed surface.
decisions.reason: Although the generated split plan separates requirements, runtime, and metadata lanes, splitting would hide the contract needed by this change. design-ssot.json, responsibility-authority.json, and docs/contracts/vibepro-core-responsibilities.json register the same PR-manager/change-risk-classifier responsibility that the runtime code now enforces; they are not unrelated cleanup. The runtime diff is limited to src/change-risk-classifier.js and src/pr-manager.js, with focused regression tests plus full npm test evidence bound to the current head. Agent gate review passed after the final pr prepare artifacts were regenerated.
